title: 破镜谋杀案
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\137-破镜谋杀案-阿加莎克里斯蒂.txt
summary:
Shelley informs Miss Marple and Xie Li that Arthur Badcock is at the police station to assist with an investigation. Xie Li reveals a rumor from Mr. Upshaw that Arthur Badcock was previously married to the actress Marina Gregg before her career took off. Following this news, Miss Marple becomes restless and determined to take action. She instructs Miss Knight to call Inspector Englebert (whom she refers to as Inch) and begins searching for a medical book to consult a specific page regarding a hint provided by Dr. Hedlock.

Miss Marple calls the Reverend to inquire about a reception held when Mrs. Badcock died. She asks if he remembers a conversation between Mrs. Badcock and Miss Gregg regarding a chance encounter in Bermuda. The Reverend recalls that Mrs. Badcock mentioned having a mild form of measles at the time. 

Driven by this information, Miss Marple takes a taxi driven by Roberts to Goose Green House to see Mr. Jason Rad. Upon arrival, she is met by a confused, frail man and a polite young man with an American accent named Blackley Preston. Despite Preston's attempts to block her access to Mr. Rad, Miss Marple insists on waiting. Preston eventually returns with Dr. Gilchrist, a man in tweeds who recognizes Miss Marple through his friendship with Dr. Hedlock. Miss Marple maintains her resolve to see Mr. Rad.
